title: Agyneia gonioclada
taxonomy: Agyneia gonioclada is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Asia, specifically in countries such as India and Sri Lanka. The classification of Agyneia gonioclada falls under the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, it belongs to the phylum Magnoliophyta. This plant is further categorized under the class Magnoliopsida and the order Celastrales. Within the Celastraceae family, Agyneia gonioclada is placed in the genus Agyneia.

properties: Agyneia gonioclada is a plant species that has been reported to possess various therapeutic properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities.
